chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-95 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 30-01-2024 Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Law Officer of ECP. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, D.A.G for Pakistan. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G for Sindh. ***** Petitioner has challenged the order dated 17.01.2024, passed by District Returning Officer, Khairpur dismissing application for change of polling station from GBHS Mitho Chandio to GPS Haji Mehmood Shar. A perusal of impugned order shows that GPS Haji Mehmood Shar was not a polling station in General Election, 2018 and more so, this Court vide order dated 22.06.2022 passed in C.P.No.D-799 of 2022 has retained GPS Mitho Chandio as polling station for Local Government Election, 2022. The polling station in the same school was also polling station in General Election 2018. No cogent ground derailing the observations of DRO, Khairpur has been put forward, particularly when already this Court has decided in favour of retaining GPS, Mitho Chandio, as stated. Hence, no case for indulgence is made out and accordingly, this petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
